panes.name: frontend
panes.command: pnpm --filter @ojfbot/daily-logger-frontend dev || (echo 'frontend dev unavailable; idle' && tail -f /dev/null)

panes.name: claude-headless
panes.command: node /Users/yuri/ojfbot/core/scripts/hooks/bead-emit.mjs agent-create --role=worker --app=daily-logger --session-id=launcher && echo '✓ daily-logger-agent-worker registered' && tail -f /dev/null
